DECLARATION OF ADREA RUIZ-ESQUIDE IN SUPPORT OF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S OPPOS TO PETITIONER'S MOTION TO TAX COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO SAN FRANCISCO PLANNING DEPARTMENT SAN FRANCISCO DEPARTMENT OF BUILDING INSPECTION SAN FRANCISCO BOARD OF APPEALS

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER GAETANO ZANELLI'S MOTION TO TAX COSTS. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. THE MOVING PARTY HAS FAILED TO CARRY ITS BURDEN OF DEMONSTRATING THAT THE COSTS WERE UNNECESSARY OR UNREASONABLE. COURT MAKES THE FOLLOWING RULINGS ON PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENTIARY OBJECTIONS: LACH'S DECLARATION - OBJECTIONS TO PARAGRAPHS 4, 5 AND 6 ARE OVERRULED. TURNER'S DECLARATION - PARAGRAPHS 7, 9 AND 10 ARE OVERRULED. ESQUEDA'S DECLARATION - PARAGRAPHS 26, 27 AND 29 ARE OVERRULED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
